home.subtitle: Certified Heating Engineer & Plumber
home.desc: Dependable professional plumber and heating engineer located in Colchester, Essex.
home.smart: We fit wireless and smart heating controls. Save money on your energy bills!

smart.title: Smart Heating
smart.desc: Hive, Nest, Tado — wireless thermostats and smart controls. Cut your energy bills by up to 30%.

emergency.title: Emergency Call-Outs
emergency.desc: Burst pipe? No heating? We offer rapid response for emergencies — often same day service.

nocallout.title: No Call-Out Fee
nocallout.desc: Free quotes, no call-out charges. You only pay for the work done. Honest, transparent pricing.

rated.title: 5-Star Rated
rated.desc: 50+ verified 5-star reviews. Trusted by homeowners across Colchester, Ipswich and Essex.

gassafe.title: Gas Safe Certified
gassafe.desc: Fully registered Gas Safe engineer. All gas work certified and compliant with regulations.

local.title: Truly Local
local.desc: Based in Colchester, covering Essex and Suffolk. Quick response times across the region.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Experience & Reliability
about.desc1: Rated 5 stars — we offer a fully comprehensive service including new boilers and heating systems, annual boiler inspections & servicing, landlords certificates, bathroom refurbishments.
about.desc2: Your local friendly and dependable plumber based in Colchester, Essex.

boilers.title: Boilers
boilers.desc: Installation, repairs, servicing. All major brands. Gas Safe certified with warranty.

bathrooms.title: Bathrooms
bathrooms.desc: Full installations. Showers, wet rooms, suites. Design to completion.

heating.title: Heating
heating.desc: Radiators, underfloor heating, power flushing. Full system upgrades.

smart.title: Smart Controls
smart.desc: Hive, Nest, Tado. Wireless thermostats. Cut your energy bills.

plumbing.title: Plumbing
plumbing.desc: Leaks, taps, toilets, pipework. No job too small. Quick response.

landlord.title: Landlord Certs
landlord.desc: CP12 gas safety certificates. Same day issue. Great rates.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Give me a call or drop a text. Free quotes, friendly advice, no pressure.
contact.areasNote: Not listed? Give me a call — I'm flexible on travel for the right job.
